assertion.value: A US provisional patent has been filed based on this work by the inventors of Z.M., Z.Y., Y.M. and B.Z. Some intellectual property related to this work is licensed to NS Nanotech, Inc. and NX Fuels, Inc., which were co-founded by Z.M. The University of Michigan and Z.M. have a financial interest in these companies.
